title: SiTime Latest Stock News and Market Updates
text: SiTime (SITM) stock news and market updates show strong momentum driven by AI data center growth. Recent developments include the Hart-Scott-Rodino waiting period expiration on May 11, 2026, advancing the Renesas Timing Business Acquisition. The company introduced the Elite 2 Super-TCXO timing device targeting AI data centers with volume production planned for Q3 2026. Multiple analyst upgrades and price target increases have followed Q1 2026's strong earnings beat. On May 7, 2026, SITM stock surged 27.91%, closing at $797.31. The stock price momentum reflects strong investor confidence in the company's AI infrastructure positioning and growth prospects. Long-term tailwinds from AI infrastructure investments continue to support the bullish outlook.
